notes: FAO-style potential and open-water ET check on the V-tilted elevation/albedo grid.
Open-water evaporation demand exceeds ponded storage and must be capped by available surface water.
Root-zone soil water is abundant so actual soil ET should equal prescribed map demand.
Root-accessible storage is smaller than demand so extraction must stop when accessible storage is exhausted.
Root depth is shallower than the near-surface layer so only the rooted fraction of near-surface water is extractable.
Internal ETP mode uses Hydro_States.ETP for soil cells and Hydro_States.Ep for ponded channel cells.
Dry cells below the minimum storage threshold impervious cells and invalid cells must not extract soil ET.
